parameters.name: Address line
parameters.description: A string specifying the street line of an address (not including city, country region, etc).

parameters.name: Locality (City)
parameters.description: A string that contains the locality, such as a US city.

parameters.name: Admin district (State)
parameters.description: A string that contains a subdivision, such as the abbreviation of a US state.

parameters.name: Postal code
parameters.description: A string that contains the postal code, such as a US ZIP Code.

parameters.name: Country region
parameters.description: A string specifying the ISO country code.

parameters.name: Point Latitude
parameters.description: The latitude coordinate you want to reverse geocode. Example: 47.64054

parameters.name: Point Longitude
parameters.description: The longitude coordinate you want to reverse geocode. Example: -122.12934

parameters.name: Include Entity Types
parameters.description: The entity types that you want to return in the response.

parameters.name: Include Neighborhood
parameters.description: A value determining whether or not to include the neighborhood in the response when it is available. 0 or 1

parameters.name: Include Country Code
parameters.description: A value determining whether or not to include the two-letter ISO country code. ciso2

parameters.name: Point latitude
parameters.description: The latitude coordinate you want to reverse geocode. Example: 47.64054

parameters.name: Point longitude
parameters.description: The longitude coordinate you want to reverse geocode. Example: -122.12934

parameters.name: Imagery set
parameters.description: The type of imagery.

parameters.name: Zoom level
parameters.description: The level of zoom to display between 0 and 21. Default 10

parameters.name: Image format
parameters.description: The image format to use for the static map.

parameters.name: Map size
parameters.description: The width and height in pixels of the static map output. Example: 1000,600.

parameters.name: Pushpin
parameters.description: Point value (latitude and longitude) with options to add a label of up to three (3) characters and to specify an icon style. Example: 47.610,-122.107;5;P10 (more information https://aka.ms/u8b8aq).

parameters.name: Point latitude
parameters.description: The latitude coordinate you want to reverse geocode. Example: 47.64054

parameters.name: Point longitude
parameters.description: The longitude coordinate you want to reverse geocode. Example: -122.12934

parameters.name: Imagery set
parameters.description: The type of imagery.

parameters.name: Zoom level
parameters.description: The level of zoom to display between 0 and 21. Default 10

parameters.name: Image format
parameters.description: The image format to use for the static map.

parameters.name: Map size
parameters.description: The width and height in pixels of the static map output. Example: 1000,600.

parameters.name: Pushpin latitude
parameters.description: Specify pushpin latitude (more information https://aka.ms/u8b8aq).

parameters.name: Pushpin longitude
parameters.description: Specify pushpin longitude (more information https://aka.ms/u8b8aq).

parameters.name: Pushpin icon style
parameters.description: Specify pushpin icon style (more information https://aka.ms/u8b8aq).

parameters.name: Pushpin label
parameters.description: Specify a label of up to three (3) characters (more information https://aka.ms/u8b8aq).

parameters.name: Waypoint 1
parameters.description: Specified as a point, landmark, or address. (47.610,-122.107 or Seattle, WA)

parameters.name: Waypoint 2
parameters.description: Specified as a point, landmark, or address. (47.610,-122.107 or Seattle, WA)

parameters.name: Avoid
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of values from the following list (highways, tolls, minimizeHighways, minimizeTolls).

parameters.name: Optimize
parameters.description: Specifies what parameters to use to optimize the route.

parameters.name: Distance unit
parameters.description: The units to use for distance in the response. Default: Kilometer

parameters.name: Travel mode
parameters.description: The mode of travel for the route. Default: Driving

parameters.name: Transit Date-Time
parameters.description: Required when the travel mode is transit. Identifies the desired transit time, such as arrival time or departure time.

parameters.name: Transit Date-Time Type
parameters.description: Required when the travel mode is transit. Specifies how to interpret the transit date-time value.

parameters.name: Waypoint 1
parameters.description: Specified as a point, landmark, or address. (47.610,-122.107 or Seattle, WA)

parameters.name: Waypoint 2
parameters.description: Specified as a point, landmark, or address. (47.610,-122.107 or Seattle, WA)

parameters.name: Avoid highways
parameters.description: Avoids the use of highways in the route.

parameters.name: Avoid tolls
parameters.description: Avoids the use of toll roads in the route.

parameters.name: Avoid ferries
parameters.description: Avoids the use of ferries in the route.

parameters.name: Minimize the use of highways
parameters.description: Minimizes (tries to avoid) the use of highways in the route.

parameters.name: Minimize the use of toll roads
parameters.description: Minimizes (tries to avoid) the use of toll roads in the route.

parameters.name: Avoid crossing country borders
parameters.description: Avoids crossing country borders in the route.
